name: leadtype-docs
description: A docs pipeline that turns one MDX source into a website, agent-readable artifacts, and a search index.

tools.name: search-docs
tools.title: Search documentation
tools.description: Search the documentation and return ranked results ({ title, urlPath, snippet }). Use get-page to read a full result.

tools.name: get-page
tools.title: Get a documentation page
tools.description: Return the full Markdown of one documentation page by its urlPath (e.g. the urlPath from a search-docs result).

serverInfo.name: leadtype-docs
serverInfo.description: A docs pipeline that turns one MDX source into a website, agent-readable artifacts, and a search index.
serverInfo.instructions: Search and read the documentation for A docs pipeline that turns one MDX source into a website, agent-readable artifacts, and a search index.
